name: daily-huddle
description: Pings every team member with open commitments, collects their standup updates, and compiles a daily huddle newsletter posted to the team Slack channel.

message.value: Run the daily huddle. Look up every team member who has open commitments from yesterday. Ping each of them via Slack DM asking for their standup update — what did they commit to yesterday, what did they deliver, and what are they working on today. Collect all replies. Then compile them into a structured daily huddle newsletter and post it to the team Slack channel.
